title: Hidden Animal
editorialSummary: Each card contains a hidden animal spelled consecutively inside it. Four groups by hidden animal: CAT (concatenate, scatter, locate, vacation), RAT (grateful, vibrate, narrate, strategy), COD (decode, barcode, encoder, codex), EWE (sewer, jewel, skewer, brewer). Classic hard misdirection: you classify a hidden substring, not the word's meaning.

meta.gptRationale: Once the hidden-string gimmick is spotted the set opens quickly, though finding the last one or two embedded animals can still take a moment.
